notes: v298 — 🤖 AUTO-PILOT LEARNS YOUR PRICES. Two additions, still practice-only and OFF unless you switched it on. 🎯 MY PICKS: name a share and YOUR prices — a buy point, and optionally your own sell point and stop. Auto-pilot places a practice LIMIT order at your buy price (sized by your 📦 rule, brokerage charged), and when it fills, your sell point becomes the 🎯 and your stop the 🛑 — your prices override the % rules, which stay as the fallback for anything you leave blank. A pick DISARMS ITSELF once it fills, so it can never re-buy in a loop; add it again if you want another go. Adding a pick for a share you ALREADY hold applies your sell/stop to that holding instead. SIGNAL GATES: tick which signals the scanner must be showing before it buys — 🚀 Breakout, 🕵️ Informed?, 🏦 Inst?, ⤴ MA cross, 🧑‍💼 Director ✓, 🥇 Vol record (at least one ticked must show; none ticked = off, exactly as before). Every decision still lands in the diary with its reason, and your 🔔 briefing reports any pick it placed. ALSO RECENT — 🤖 AUTO-PILOT (PRACTICE) — the app can now make practice buys BY YOUR RULES. It's OFF until you switch it on inside 📋 My trading rules, and it only ever uses practice money — it cannot touch a real broker or real dollars. Once per fresh data day it applies the entry rules YOU set (buy from 🎯 Smart Money or the 🏆 Top 20, optional minimum Watch Score, optional 'quiet only — no news'), and queues practice buys through exactly the same realistic path as your own taps: the order fills at the NEXT day's open, brokerage is charged, and your 🎯 take-profit and 🛑 stop-loss are set from your rules. It respects your 📦 max-per-share, 🔢 max positions and the 💧 liquidity floor, skips any parcel under $500 (the ASX minimum), and keeps a DECISION DIARY — every buy and every skip, with the reason in plain words. Your 🔔 briefing tells you whatever it queued. Why practice-only? So you can prove your rule-set works over weeks, with zero risk, before any real money ever follows it — discipline first, always. A ▶ Run-now button lets you try it instantly. ALSO RECENT — A CLEARER SIDEBAR: your Instant Reports are now organised instead of one long list. A gold ⭐ START YOUR DAY row sits at the top — 📊 Market Today, 🏆 Top 20 to Watch and 🎯 Smart Money, the three-tap daily routine the Lessons teach. Below it, the rest are grouped by what they're for: 🔎 TODAY'S ACTION (Sharp Mover, Unusual Activity, Volume Surge, Gap Report — what stood out this session), 🌱 BUILDING QUIETLY (Quiet Movers, Pullback in Uptrend, Strong Trends, Recovery Watch — patient setups), and 🧩 COMPOSITE (All Signals). Tap any group's heading to fold it away — the app remembers your choice on each device — and your 📋 Signal report card, 🔔 briefing and 📋 My trading rules now sit higher up, easier to reach. Every report is still here and works exactly as before; nothing was removed. One small change: drag-to-reorder of the report buttons is paused while the grouped layout beds in — tell us if you miss it. FASTER — three under-the-hood speed-ups: the search box now waits for you to pause typing before it filters (no more re-drawing the whole table on every keystroke — noticeably smoother on tablets and phones), the Market Radar tile counts are computed in a single pass over your shares instead of fifteen, and sorting the table does its maths once per share instead of over and over. Same numbers, same behaviour, less work. STRONGER PASSWORDS — the app's password protection has been upgraded to current best-practice strength (600,000 hashing rounds, up from 150,000). Nothing to do on your end: new and changed passwords use the new strength immediately, and your existing password is upgraded silently the next time you log in — it takes a fraction of a second and you won't notice it. SAFER DEFAULT — brand-new installs now start with the 💧 Liquidity floor set to ≥$50k traded per day, so every report skips shares that are hard to buy and sell at a fair price. The gold 💧 badge shows it's on; one tap (Type tab → Any) turns it off, and your choice is remembered on that device from now on. If you're already using the app, nothing changes — your existing setting is kept exactly as it is. FIX — the 🕵️ 'Who's actually buying?' links now land on pages that really show the data: the old shareholder-registry page some links pointed to has been retired by its publisher, so 👥 'Top shareholders & insiders' now opens a targeted search that reliably surfaces the full ownership picture (top holders with percentages, plus director buys and sells) for any share; 🧑‍💼 is relabelled 'Director filings (3Y)' and opens the official ASX filings page; and the fine print now tells you exactly what to look for — director buys/sells are the announcements titled 'Change of Director's Interest Notice', a new 5%+ holder lodges a 'substantial holder' notice, and the complete top-20 register is published in each company's annual report. (Tip: practice-mode shares that aren't real ASX listings won't match live pages — try a real code.) NEW — 🕵️ 'WHO'S ACTUALLY BUYING?': open the 🔬 Deep Dive (or 🖨 printable report) on a share showing a quiet-accumulation footprint and a new gold panel now links you straight to the public ASX filings that reveal whether a real buyer is behind the move — 👥 substantial holders (5%+), 🧑‍💼 director trades (Appendix 3Y), and 📢 announcements, one tap each. The footprint stays labelled as our estimate from price and volume; the filings are fact. Note: holdings under 5% aren't publicly disclosed, so quiet buying below that level won't show. It's the fastest way to check whether an 'informed' footprint has a real name behind it. FIX — the 🔔 'What's changed for me' briefing no longer opens twice: if you opened the app on yesterday's saved data and it then quietly refreshed to today's, the briefing used to pop once for the old data and again for the new. It now opens just once when fresh data lands — a genuine new trading day still gets its own briefing, and the 🔔 button reopens the latest any time. NEW — 📋 MY TRADING RULES NOW HAS AN ON/OFF SWITCH: some traders won't want the rules feature at all, so the 📋 My trading rules page now opens with a clear ON/OFF toggle at the top. Turn it OFF and the feature goes fully dormant — practice buys stop auto-filling your 🎯 target and 🛑 stop, and the 🔔 briefing stops flagging any rule breaches — while every number you saved is kept for whenever you switch it back on. Default is ON, so nothing changes if you're already using it; if you never wanted it, one tap makes it disappear from your day. FIX — searching a ticker no longer wipes the report you're viewing: while a report or scan is on screen, the search box now NARROWS that report in place (the same way the watchlist search works) instead of clearing it and searching the whole market. To search every share again, clear the report (the ✕ on its banner, or Clear-all). On the normal table, search is unchanged. NEW — ⛶ FULL SCREEN: a button in the top bar expands the app to fill your whole screen; press Esc (or tap the button again) to come back. FIX — in light mode, the loaded-market status pill (‘ASX · date · N stocks · live’) was staying dark; it now switches to a light style like the rest of the app. FIX — the 🔔 'What's changed for me' briefing could reopen by itself every few seconds after you closed it; it now opens at most once per fresh data day and stays closed when you dismiss it (tap the 🔔 button any time to reopen it yourself). NEW — ☀️ LIGHT & DARK MODE: a sun/moon button in the top bar switches the whole app between the dark theme and a new light theme — easier on the eyes in daylight or if you simply prefer a bright screen. It remembers your choice on each device, and the very first time you open it, it quietly matches whatever light-or-dark setting your phone or computer already uses. The accents (gold, green, red) keep their identity, just deepened a touch so everything stays crisp and readable on white. NEW — 📋 MY TRADING RULES: a place to write your own plan and have the app help you keep it. Set your take-profit %, stop-loss %, the most you'll put in any one share, and how many positions you'll hold at once — plus a free-text checklist of your own rules ('wait for a green day', 'never average down', 'review every Sunday'). Your 🎯 target and 🛑 stop then auto-fill every practice buy, and if you go over your max size, hold more positions than your rule allows, or drift past your stop, your 🔔 briefing flags it gently — never a block. It's your plan, in your words: a discipline aid, clearly not advice. SECURITY — a routine re-audit of everything drawn on screen (after this batch of new reports and the briefing) found one spot to tighten: confirmed-announcement headlines were cleaned of any hidden markup when freshly fetched, but not when re-read from their saved cache. That's now cleaned the moment it enters the app, everywhere, no matter the source — a purely protective change with no effect on normal use. FIX — a leftover ticker search no longer follows you around: searching a share and then opening ⭐ My Watchlist used to silently filter the list (e.g. '1 in My Watchlist' when 27 are starred). Every way into the watchlist — the ⭐ button, the ⚙ Lists panel, switching lists, or tapping a list in the 🔔 briefing — now clears the search box first — the full list always shows. Running any report already cleared it. NEW REPORT — 🕳 GAP REPORT: shares that OPENED 3%+ above or below yesterday's close (overnight news or a rush of morning orders), split into gapped & HELD (buyers stayed all day — strength) vs gapped & FADED (the jump fizzled — a common trap), with a tap-through summary panel grouping every gap by what happened next. It uses the daily opens the app now stores (part of the candles fix) — if most of your shares don't have opens saved yet, one 🔄 Refresh/redownload fills them in and the report says so honestly. NEW REPORT — 🧱 STRONG TRENDS: the strongest up-trend structure there is — price above the 20-day average, above the 50-day, above the 200-day (the full 'stack') — ranked by trend quality: steady slope, not overstretched, quiet accumulation. If your shares don't have 200 days of stored history yet, it tells you exactly that instead of just showing nothing. STICKY LIQUIDITY FLOOR — your 💧 Liquidity filter (Type tab) now SURVIVES every scan instead of being cleared: set '≥$250k/day' once and Smart Money, Top 20, Gap Report and every other scan quietly skip the un-tradeable shares (the 💧 badge stays visible so you always know it's on; Clear all still resets it). CLEARER BUTTONS — 🚨 Sharp Mover now says what it really is (the SIZE of today's move vs that share's own normal day) and 🔍 Unusual Activity too (five suspicious PATTERNS in HOW it traded) — two different questions, now impossible to confuse. TIDIER — the More-scans overlay retired the 📈 Momentum and ⚡ Volume Spike presets (the 🎯 Smart Money and 🔥 Volume Surge buttons do the same job better) and the remaining presets are relabelled with a plain-English explainer. 🔔 BRIEFING — What's changed for me shows your watchlists by NAME: holdings first, then each list with how many flagged today ('2 of 8 flagged'), an explicit 'all quiet today' when none did, and tap a list's name to open it. It checks YOUR practice holdings and watchlists each time fresh data loads — targets and stops hit or near, big moves, confirmed price-sensitive news, volume surges and trend crosses — and opens by itself once per new data day, only when there's something to say. CANDLES FIXED — candlestick view finally works: the daily refresh had been quietly wiping the open/high/low that candles need. Stored history is now preserved and grows daily; 🔄 Refresh/redownload restores full-depth candles immediately, and until then the chart draws clearly-labelled approximate candles instead of refusing. Candles work in demo mode too. FIX — the portfolio's 'return % is not trustworthy' warning behaves: tiny rounding residue no longer warns, bigger differences show the exact $ amount with a one-tap '✓ This balance is right — stop warning' that sticks, and it only returns if something NEW drifts. REPORT CARD — every flag's fires split into 📢 news-driven vs 🔇 quiet, plus how many WINNERS had news behind them; fires the app's announcement log can't cover are marked 'unknown', never guessed. CHARTS — professional refresh: round-number gridlines on the right axis, month ticks, dotted last-price line, soft glow, live price readout in the header. FILTERS — 💧 Liquidity ($ traded/day: Any / ≥$50k / ≥$250k / ≥$1M) replaces the old market-cap filter, and an RSI zone filter (Oversold ≤30 / Neutral / Overbought ≥70). 🪜 PULLBACK IN UPTREND report: uptrend shares that pulled back to the 20-day line with RSI cooled to 35–55. The 🎓 Lessons and 📖 Help cover all of this, including the two new reports. PAPER TRADING — the ↩ undo button removed from trade history (closed trades stay honest). DEMO — practice shares carry their correct real-world names, and demo data can't fake a gap. All figures are end-of-day estimates, not advice.
